title: mtools bug fix and enhancement update
overview: An update for Oracle Linux is now available for Oracle Linux 9.
description:
[4.0.26-5]
- Increase error message buffer size
- Prevent a leak of iconv_t
- Prevent a file descriptor leak
full_text:
[4.0.26-5]
- Increase error message buffer size
- Prevent a leak of iconv_t
- Prevent a file descriptor leak
